latin: Vir bibens in caupona sua sedens gemuit: 'ex omnibus cauponibus in omnibus oppidis totius orbis, illa in meam intravit.'

questions.prompt: How does the man feel about the woman's arrival?
questions.target: It seems like an unfair twist of fate
choices: It seems like an unfair twist of fate

questions.prompt: Where is the man when the woman arrives?

translation: A drinking man, sitting in his own bar, groaned: 'Of all the bars in all the towns in the whole world, she walked into mine.'
